message:
ci: remove sibling repo checkouts now that deps are on crates.io

Remove the checkout steps for asupersync, rich_rust, charmed_rust, and
sqlmodel_rust from CI and benchmark workflows. These were required when
Cargo.toml used path = "../repo" dependencies pointing to sibling
directory checkouts. Now that all four crates are published to crates.io
and Cargo.toml references registry versions instead:

.github/workflows/ci.yml:
- Remove 4 actions/checkout@v4 steps for sibling repos (28 lines)
- Cargo will resolve asupersync, rich_rust, charmed-bubbletea/lipgloss/
  bubbles/glamour, and sqlmodel-sqlite/core from the crates.io registry

.github/workflows/bench.yml:
- Remove identical 4 checkout steps from both the benchmark job and the
  comparison job (56 lines total)

This simplifies CI setup, reduces checkout time, and eliminates the
fragile coupling between CI and sibling repo branch state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,34 +26,6 @@ jobs:
         with:
           path: pi_agent_rust
 
-      - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
-          path: asupersync
-          fetch-depth: 1
-
-      - name: Checkout rich_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust
-          path: rich_rust
-          fetch-depth: 1
-
-      - name: Checkout charmed_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/charmed_rust
-          path: charmed_rust
-          fetch-depth: 1
-
-      - name: Checkout sqlmodel_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust
-          path: sqlmodel_rust
-          fetch-depth: 1
-
       - name: Install system deps (bc, fd, rg) [linux]
         run: |
           set -euxo pipefail

-          path: sqlmodel_rust
-          fetch-depth: 1
-

         with:
           ref: main
